title: session-start.sh gives no actionable message when jq missing on Windows Git Bash
body: On Windows using Git Bash, jq isn't on PATH by default. The hook prints the INFO fallback message telling users to brew/apt install jq, which doesn't help Windows users. Please add a Windows-appropriate install hint.

title: DESCRIPTION_TRIGGER regex misses "Use prior to" phrasing
body: validate-skills.js only accepts descriptions matching /\buse (this )?when\b|\buse (before|after|during)\b/i as satisfying the required 'when to use' trigger. A skill I wrote used "Use prior to committing..." and got flagged as an error even though it clearly states when to use it.

title: Document process for adding new SECTION_EXEMPT_SKILLS entries
body: SECTION_EXEMPT_SKILLS in validate-skills.js is a hardcoded map with a comment saying exemptions live there so contributors can't bypass the check from their own skill file, but there's no CONTRIBUTING note describing how to actually request an exemption via PR review.

title: Tier 3 behavioral evals have no timeout, can hang CI-adjacent runs
body: run-evals.js --behavioral spawns a headless claude process via execFileSync per eval case but there's no timeout option passed, so a stuck eval run blocks the whole script indefinitely instead of failing with a clear timeout error.

title: idea-refine.sh does not clean up temp workspace on failure
body: When skills/idea-refine/scripts/idea-refine.sh exits early due to an error partway through, it looks like scratch files it creates aren't removed, leaving stale state for the next invocation.
